characters.appearance: A young adult woman with a slender build and medium complexion. She has long, straight dark hair that reaches her waist, styled with a side part. Her facial features are expressive, with dark eyes and a confident smile.
characters.wardrobe: An olive green kurta with a subtle, light-colored block print pattern. The kurta has three-quarter sleeves and side slits, worn over dark trousers.
characters.demeanor: Initially confident and assertive, then friendly and enthusiastic when explaining.

characters.appearance: A young adult man of average build with a medium complexion. He has short, curly dark hair and light stubble. He wears clear-framed glasses, giving him an intellectual look.
characters.wardrobe: A black collared shirt with long sleeves, worn untucked, paired with dark blue trousers.
characters.demeanor: Observant and initially skeptical, transitioning to surprised and curious.

characters.appearance: A young adult man of average build with a medium complexion. He has short, curly dark hair and light stubble. His facial features are soft, and he has a friendly expression.
characters.wardrobe: A light grey or off-white collared shirt, open at the neck, with short sleeves.
characters.demeanor: Observant and initially skeptical, transitioning to surprised and curious.

characters.appearance: A young adult woman with a fair complexion and long, wavy dark hair styled over one shoulder. She has a friendly and approachable face with expressive eyes and a warm smile.
characters.wardrobe: A bright pink saree with a subtle gold border, accessorized with simple gold earrings.
characters.demeanor: Friendly, encouraging, and professional, as if speaking directly to a learner.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: अब हँसो? अब मेरी English का मज़ाक उड़ाओगे? [Now laugh? Now you'll make fun of my English?]
Character A says: I've been practicing on this app, and now I can speak better English than you guys.
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable scenario of being mocked for poor English.
- Shows the protagonist's newfound confidence and fluency.
- Sets up the premise of a transformative app.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
अब हँसो? (Hindi)
अब मेरी English का मज़ाक उड़ाओगे? (Hindi)
Practicing on this app, now I can speak better English than you guys. (English)

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Seriously?
Character C says: Wow, very fluent English!
Character B says: भाई, कौन सी app है ये? [Brother, which app is this?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Validates the protagonist's improvement through the friends' surprised reactions.
- Builds curiosity about the solution.
- Prompts the reveal of the app.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Seriously? (English)
Wow, very fluent English! (English)
भाई, कौन सी app है ये? (Hindi)

scenes.scene_summary:
- Reveals the brand name.
- Connects the protagonist's success to the product.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: ये एक AI English tutor app है, [This is an AI English tutor app,]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Shows the app interface and the AI tutor feature.
- Explains the core functionality of the app.
- Reinforces the brand's value proposition.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova (App UI)
ये एक AI English tutor app है, (Hindi)
